message:
feat(index): implement leapfrog triejoin for multi-way index alignment

Adds heap-based k-way merge union (leapfrog_union), classic leapfrog
intersection with binary search seek, and multi_way_align producing
per-input position vectors. Isomorphism proof: multi-way union matches
iterative pairwise union. 15 new tests including large-scale (5x1000).

Closes: bd-2t5e.11 (AG-11)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
